record.field: Payment Confirmation – Tint Tone And Shade
Sent automatically to customer when a payment is posted

div.p:
Dear ,
We would like to acknowledge with thanks the receipt of towards your interior project with Tint Tone And Shade.
Your payment has been successfully processed and documented. This amount will be adjusted against your project cost as per the agreed milestones.
We appreciate your continued trust and are excited to move forward in transforming your space into your dream home. Our team will keep you updated on the upcoming stages of execution.
Thank you once again for choosing Tint Tone And Shade.
Warm Regards,
Tint Tone And Shade
